scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:smoke: npm --prefix backend test -- --testPathPatterns="server.test.js|table.test.js|menu.test.js|order.test.js|staff.test.js|customer.test.js|dashboard.test.js|statistics.test.js" && npm --prefix frontend test -- --testPathPatterns="AdminTablePage.test.jsx|AdminMenuPage.test.jsx|AdminOrderPage.test.jsx|AdminStaffPage.test.jsx|AdminCustomerPage.test.jsx"
